WITH segment_min_consumption AS (
  SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    ym.CustomerID,
    SUM(ym.Consumption) AS total_consumption
  FROM 
    yearmonth ym
  JOIN 
    customers c ON ym.CustomerID = c.CustomerID
  WHERE 
    ym.Date BETWEEN '201301' AND '201312'
    AND c.Currency = 'CZK'
  GROUP BY 
    c.Segment, ym.CustomerID
),
segment_min_avg AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    MIN(total_consumption) AS min_consumption
  FROM 
    segment_min_consumption
  GROUP BY 
    Segment
),
segment_least_customers AS (
  SELECT 
    smc.Segment,
    smc.CustomerID,
    smc.total_consumption
  FROM 
    segment_min_consumption smc
  JOIN 
    segment_min_avg sma ON smc.Segment = sma.Segment
  AND smc.total_consumption = sma.min_consumption
),
segment_avg_consumption AS (
  SELECT 
    Segment,
    AVG(total_consumption) AS avg_consumption
  FROM 
    segment_least_customers
  GROUP BY 
    Segment
)
SELECT 
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') AS sme_lam_diff,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'LAM') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') AS lam_kam_diff,
  (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'KAM') - (SELECT avg_consumption FROM segment_avg_consumption WHERE Segment = 'SME') AS kam_sme_diff;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing

SELECT 
    c.Segment,
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.Date) = 2012 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2012,
    SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.Date) = 2013 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) AS consumption_2013,
    (SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.Date) = 2013 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.Date) = 2012 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) AS increase,
    ((SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.Date) = 2013 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END) - SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.Date) = 2012 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) / SUM(CASE WHEN YEAR(y.Date) = 2013 THEN y.Consumption ELSE 0 END)) * 100 AS percentage_increase
FROM 
    customers c
JOIN 
    yearmonth y ON c.CustomerID = y.CustomerID
WHERE 
    c.Currency = 'EUR'
    AND YEAR(y.Date) IN (2012, 2013)
GROUP BY 
    c.Segment
ORDER BY 
    percentage_increase DESC;	----- bird -----	debit_card_specializing
